title: himatanthus attenuatus var. obtusifolius
intro: Himatanthus attenuatus var. obtusifolius, also known as the 'Brazilian Starfish' or 'Pau-Ribeirinho', is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of the alkaloids himatanthin and himatanthine, which have shown anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions, as well as exhibit antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Himatanthus attenuatus var. obtusifolius is often used in traditional herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to promote skin health and accelerate wound healing.
